stemHtml: In the event of an urgency situation needing a PAN PAN call, how should radio communication between the aircraft and ATC be managed?

options.a: The pilot may select any frequency they find suitable for the situation.
options.b: ATC will always transfer the aircraft to a discrete frequency to avoid congested traffic.
options.c: Communication should continue on the frequency currently in use.
options.d: The pilot should switch to the emergency frequency 121.5 MHz.
